category_sources: Official repository description identifies libavif as the AVIF encoding and decoding library.
source_facts.description says library for encoding and decoding .avif files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo is the official AOMediaCodec/libavif repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best official documentation surface for the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/AOMediaCodec/libavif, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies AVIF encoding and decoding.
source_facts.executables lists avifenc and avifdec command-line tools.
